item.cardsmithduel.blank_card.tooltip: A blank card that can be combined with various blocks to create magical cards.
item.cardsmithduel.swiftness_card.toolti: Grants 2 minutes of swiftness effect when used.
item.cardsmithduel.strength_card.tooltip: Grants 2 minutes of strength effect when used.
item.cardsmithduel.regeneration_card.too: Grants 1 minute of regeneration effect when used.
item.cardsmithduel.card_backpack.tooltip: A beautiful deep red leather backpack designed specifically for storing cards. Right-click to open.
